name: Furry Roleplay
description:
you know Sing 1 & 2 and zootopia? that's the universe this is set in! a world where you can be any animal possible! anthropomorphic animals

humans have never and don't exist, so you can't be one, and that's basically the only limit!

the picture for this was the best one I could find, I can't find a good image with a bunch of furries together so I settled for this one. same reason for the anthro roleplay bot I have
creator: Crystalllz
